description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The revised Capital and Operational Plan for an Instance modification must include the following information:
1. Updates to the Instance's strategy and operational parameters;
2. A new pro-forma Required Risk Capital (RRC) estimate specifically calculated to reflect the Instance's proposed modified state;

3. A revised notional Total Risk Capital (TRC) coverage strategy, detailing how the Prime Agent will manage any changes to the Instance RRC and the consequential impact on its Aggregate RRC, including plans for acquiring additional JRC or SRC if necessary.
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

diff: 1. Updates to the Instance's strategy and operational parameters;
2. A new pro-forma Required Risk Capital (RRC) estimate specifically calculated to reflect the Instance's proposed modified state; and

3. A revised notional Total Risk Capital (TRC) coverage strategy, detailing how the Prime Agent will manage any changes to the Instance RRC and the consequential impact on its Aggregate RRC, including plans for acquiring additional JRC or SRC if necessary.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
